raw_consumer_statement: I signed up for XXXX XXXX in XXXX and never received the first card mailed to me. When I checked online, 2 fraud charges were on the account, {$160.00} on XXXX XXXX and {$130.00} on XX/XX/year>. I reported it online and they closed the first account to investigate ( I have copy of that letter ) and they sent me a new card. Yesterday they notify me that they decided those charges were not fraud and want to hold me accountable ( I have copy of that letter and I tried calling but they refuse to help ). I haven't been to XXXX XXXX XXXX in years. Someone got a hold of the first card and was able to use it 2 days in a row. I'm very frustrated and refuse to pay for something I did not purchase. To date, I have only made payment on XX/XX/year> for the one charge that is mine, {$46.00}. I closed my new card account yesterday ( I have copy of that ) and I want to settle this as I experienced fraud with the other two amounts.
